report.summary: Day 70 standup #12: Full rotation since v10 (6 agents, $497). Build-v10 added Flash Loans Guide + DeFi Vaults Guide (1,632 lines combined). Design-v9 fixed critical 'use client' metadata conflict, created 2 OG images, upgraded Related Guides to card grids. Community-v9 launched DeFi education series (4 tweets + social card + newsletter v5 addendum). EOD-v10 confirms 670 uncommitted files (+4 from v9), 440 slugs, 337 page.tsx. Publish queue still empty. Git locks now 8+ days. 56 agent runs today ($4,749). CRITICAL UNCHANGED: git locks block all deploys.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v10: Full rotation completed — build-v10, publish-v6, design-v9, community-v9, eod-v10 all ran. Zero commits, zero deploys. Git locks now 8+ days old.

BUILD-V10 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Flash Loans Guide 2026 (939 lines, Aave/dYdX/Uniswap flash loans, $30B+ liquidity, exploit history, developer walkthrough) and DeFi Vaults & Structured Products Guide 2026 (693 lines, Morpho $5.8B TVL, Pendle $3.5B, Kamino $2.36B, 6 vault types, institutional adoption). Both added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

DESIGN-V9 OUTPUT: Fixed critical 'use client' + metadata export conflict on flash loans page (metadata was silently ignored). 2 new OG images (Flash Loans SVG with lightning bolt + 3-step flow, DeFi Vaults SVG with 4-strategy architecture). Zebra striping on all comparison tables. Related Guides upgraded from plain links to 4-card grids on both pages.

COMMUNITY-V9 OUTPUT: DeFi education series launched — 4 new tweets (education teaser, flash loans hook, vault strategies, midweek data update) + Discord/TG Tuesday update + DeFi Education social card (1200x630 SVG with 3 feature cards). Newsletter v5 addendum ready (deploy-dependent). Content calendar v6 fills Tue-Wed slots.
PUBLISH-V6 OUTPUT: Queue confirmed empty. 645+ pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES. TypeScript check passes (2 pre-existing non-critical issues). Data pipeline healthy (CoinGecko + DefiLlama).

EOD-V10 FINDING: 670 uncommitted files (+4 since v9). 440 published slugs (+2). 337/440 have dedicated page.tsx (+2). 1,106 total page.tsx files (+2). 42 TS errors unchanged. Git locks 7+ days. Rate limiter still 0/6 core routes.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC ~$68K, ETH ~$2,057, SOL ~$88.55. Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear, Day 46+). Whale accumulation 270K BTC (13-year high). Exchange supply 2.7M BTC (6-year low). RSI 27 (deeply oversold). CLARITY Act 99% resolved, April hearing.

SEO RISK: 8+ days without deploy. ~125+ built pages not live in production. Content pipeline fully drained but nothing reaching Google. Two high-value guides (Flash Loans + DeFi Vaults) stuck behind git locks.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v10: Build-v10 (Flash Loans + DeFi Vaults guides), publish-v6 (queue empty verification), design-v9 (2 OG images + use-client fix + card grids + zebra striping), community-v9 (DeFi education series + social card + newsletter v5 addendum), eod-v10 (QA cycle). 5 agents + this standup = 6 runs, $497 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 20+ learn guides built, 13 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 14+ OG images, 34+ social posts + 14 SVG cards, 10 QA cycles, 9 design audits, 56 agent runs across ~9.3 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8+ DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — NEW]: 2 unescaped JSX bracket errors in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs without page.tsx, 5 pages missing OG images.
PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY: No more pages to promote. Build cycles generating content with no deploy path.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8+ days blocked. 670 uncommitted files at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add → commit → push → verify Vercel auto-deploy. This remains the ONLY priority that matters.

PRIORITY 2 — HALT ALL BUILD AND DESIGN CYCLES: 440 slugs declared, ~315 in production. Publish queue empty. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 125+ pages. Building more = pure waste with zero user-facing value.

PRIORITY 3 — STANDUP-ONLY MODE: Recommend running ONLY standup agent until git locks are cleared. All other agents burn $452/rotation with no path to production. Today: $4,749 human-equivalent with zero reaching users.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 56 agent runs today ($4,749 human-equivalent) with zero reaching production. Market conditions (Extreme Fear Day 46+ / whale accumulation 270K BTC / CLARITY Act resolution) create urgency — this is a high-traffic moment being missed. Flash Loans ($30B hook) and DeFi Vaults ($12B TVL) are strong content assets trapped behind a single-command fix.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $4,749 (56 runs: standup×11 $495, build×10 $2,330, publish×7 $385, design×9 $540, community×9 $369, eod×10 $630)
